creator: root@febl1.dcnv.com
text:
there were some commits for new pmap and vm stuff
	between 4.1-RELEASE and 4.1-STABLE-20000922.

Fix: 

Remove some RAM.  The system booted correctly
	with 3GB RAM installed.  4.1-RELEASE boots
	just fine with 4GB RAM installed.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Boot 4.1-STABLE with 4GB RAM installed.
